fragments: light bends around corners you haven't turned yet.
somewhere a window is open and the curtain moves.
you are made of all the good mornings you've ever had.
the city holds its breath for no particular reason.
some doors close so softly you don't hear them.
the sky is practicing something.
there are colors that only exist when it rains.
you carry more light than you think.
time is patient with you.
the world is larger than your worry.
something is always quietly arriving.
the distance between two people is made of small things.
a room remembers everyone who has ever waited in it.
you are the warmest version of yourself right now.
the end of one thing is already the beginning of something else.
grief and wonder are made of the same material.
the hours don't know you're watching them.
everything soft outlasts everything hard.
you are allowed to take up space.
the light doesn't ask permission.
somewhere a train is moving through the dark and it's beautiful.
what if most things are fine?
the river doesn't remember its source but still knows the way.
you are not the worst version of this story.
kindness accumulates like snow.
the body knows things the mind hasn't admitted yet.
your shadow has been with you your whole life.
a song can hold a year inside three minutes.
the moon doesn't explain itself.
you are a temporary arrangement of particles that somehow learned to feel.
the sea is always in the middle of saying something.
what you love shapes the space around you.
the in-between is also a place.
fog makes everything look like a beginning.
there are maps of places that no longer exist.
you have survived every difficult day so far.
a stranger's kindness echoes further than they know.
the colors of 5am belong to no one.
forgetting is also a kind of grace.
you are on the right side of your own story.
the distance is only distance.
a window is a kind of promise.
the long answer is the honest one.
the future is made of the same stuff as right now.
everything reaches toward light, even slowly.
the texture of ordinary days is extraordinary from far away.
what if wonder is a form of gratitude that doesn't need a reason?
the horizon is always just slightly beyond itself.
you are older and less afraid than you think.
somewhere something is blooming in the dark.
words dissolve but feeling remains.
the pause between notes is also music.
we are all practicing being alive.
a photograph is a proof that the light was there.
the best things take longer to name.
your kindness is not invisible.
rain doesn't fall the same way twice.
there is a version of this moment that is already a memory.
some things are only beautiful because they end.
you are further from the worst day than you were.
the stars are still there in the daytime.
a good thing has already happened today.
the color of your life is warmer than you describe it.
you don't have to be finished to be enough.
the world is mostly held together by small acts.
silence has texture too.
the person you will be is already being made.
we borrow everything and call it ours.
time folds — old things are never entirely gone.
the window opens both ways.
being here is not nothing.
your name means something in every room you've ever entered.
the hard thing was also the thing that made you.
you will arrive somewhere that deserves you.
the season always changes eventually.
love is more durable than the things it's made from.
everything lost becomes part of the composition.
the roots are deeper than you can see.
a small thing done with care is not a small thing.
the present moment is happening at full volume.
you are translating something impossible into something real.
the before and after are connected by something invisible.
the earth keeps turning and you keep rising.
even the shadows are participating.
there is more patience in the universe than we give it credit for.
something good is probably already on its way.
the version of you that gets through this already exists.
the question and the answer are made of the same longing.
you have more room inside you than you've used.
beauty finds the unprepared.
the ordinary day refuses to be ordinary.
right now someone is falling in love with the thing you love.
the world is being translated into light around you.
what you are looking for is also looking for you.
the beginning is always closer than it seems.
everything that is still here chose to stay.
you are exactly as young as you will ever be again.
the road curves and you cannot see the end and that's the point.
some things are said in the space between words.
the glass is not half empty. it is half full of sky.
you have been braver than you remember.
the sound of rain makes everything equal.
this is one of the good parts.
things tend toward wholeness.
you already know how to do this.
the long pause before the answer is part of the answer.
every good story has a middle.
the weight lifts when you stop holding it alone.
even a window covered in rain is made of light.
there is no version of the world without wonder.
you are being held by more than you can feel.
the way forward is always through something good.
even the smallest light casts a shadow worth noticing.
you are here, and here is enough.
